title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-15 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Gap review table (continued)

StoryGap score (%)PM lensQA lensXO lensSeverity / open questions

HRREC-91998
PH: Recruiter can see message threads when clicking on a message

38% — personas mostly align on known dependencies
  • Pagination, fetch failure, ordering/timezones, deep link.
  • Internal: UI Platform conversation threads reference; HRREC-26069 relationship nuance. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

Recruiting Email + nonsingular. — Thread rendering vs singular job posting context not in story.

P3 — refinable before build

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-91999
PH: Recruiter sees blue unread marker removed after clicking in the full view

60% — open product semantics
  • Peek vs full triggers; per-user vs shared read semantics open (Scenario 3).
  • Internal: Weak analogies. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

Candidate Communication Item only. — Read/unread persistence model not evidenced — high delivery risk until product decides semantics.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

Decide per-user vs shared read/unread first. Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-92001
PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand & views full message when clicking grow or a message

64% — thin Jira AC, XO adjacency weak
  • Thin spec — expand Jira AC before deep edge-case review.
  • Formal AC table empty; a11y for overlay vs push; breakpoint targets missing.
  • Internal: Modals/side panels UI Platform; Canvas Kit SidePanel focus trap; MSTF sizing. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

No reliable grow/panel artefacts in index (search empty/errored). — Wide layout may be net-new UI integration vs indexed primitives.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-92002
PH: Style only - messages styled per Figma

52% — thin Jira AC
  • Thin spec — expand Jira AC before deep edge-case review.
  • Formal AC empty; RTL/long HTML/loading/error missing; ordering sample data undefined.
  • Internal: HRREC-84383 sent-message visual design; generic branding hits. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

SMS What's New items dominate hits. — Email thread styling may diverge from SMS paths.

P2 — thin spec

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-92003
PH: Recruiter sees error messages if their email has bounced

64% — thin Jira AC, XO adjacency weak
  • Thin spec — expand Jira AC before deep edge-case review.
  • Formal AC empty; provider mapping to variants; translation fallbacks thin.
  • Internal: SES bounce/suppression runbooks. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images). Bounces: invalid domains + analytics visibility.

No SES/bounce-specific instances found. — Telemetry↔UI join may be missing without new contracts.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-92004
PH: Recruiter sees error when sending message (REST error)

64% — thin Jira AC, XO adjacency weak
  • Thin spec — expand Jira AC before deep edge-case review.
  • Formal AC empty; status taxonomy/retry rules thin; draft loss on refresh.
  • Internal: FINCUST SendMessage REST error UI precedent (different product). Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

No conversational-email send REST artefacts in search. — Layered errors may be inconsistent across recruiting flows.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

HRREC-92005
PH: Info message and cannot send if candidate changes email

52% — thin Jira AC
  • Thin spec — expand Jira AC before deep edge-case review.
  • Formal AC empty; merge notes vs non-merge email change; in-flight compose.
  • Internal: Two-way rules tied to lifecycle; primary email on merge threads. Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

Strong merge/primary-home-email method bindings + WATS merge scenarios. — Thread gating on non-merge email change may be underspecified vs rich merge metadata.

P2 — thin spec

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images).

No recruiting email opt-out artefacts found. — Reusing SMS consent pipelines without email-specific metadata is risky.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images). Agency: view/send domains + ambiguous ownership.

Recruiting Agency Candidate Event method bindings + tasks. — Tabs in side panel vs platform guidance — product decision not captured.

P2 — thin spec

Align outcomes to recruiter-visible behaviour; fix limit language (7MB + server parity).

64% — thin Jira AC, XO adjacency weak

  • Internal: Agency security/purge articles; My Conversations setup (channel mismatch risk). Tenant/QA staging: Executive summary + DA thread.
  • Reply-To mailbox; bell vs My Conversations (SMS); 7MB + Recruiting Communications purge.
  • Clean email templates (avoid 0-byte images). Agency: view/send domains + ambiguous ownership.

No agency-specific conversation auth bindings in search. — Enforcement likely service/security — regression via reports/RaaS.

P2 — integration or limits ambiguity

HRREC-92012

50% — XO adjacency weak

No tenant prompt instances returned for new cap/scheduler. — Email parity with SMS lifecycle knobs unclear — may be net-new metadata.

HRREC-92016
